title: gilia micrantha f. aurea
intro: Gilia micrantha f. aurea is a yellow-flowered variety of the Gilia micrantha plant, a species of flowering plant in the phlox family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gilia micrantha f. aurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
